title: Casa Grande is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Casa Grande is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Casa Grande. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Property Advisor to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Casa Grande:
Casa Grande is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Casa Grande!
